bead.title: Visibility 1: SD-023 ddx/ddx-agent boundary design doc
bead.description: Write new file docs/helix/02-design/solution-designs/SD-023-agent-routing-visibility.md. Documents the boundary: ddx-agent owns providers, /v1/models discovery, health-aware routing, model catalog; DDx owns beads/worktrees/orchestration/UI and surfaces ddx-agent state through its own commands via Go package import (github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/agent v0.3.5+). Explains that DDx adds no duplicate discovery/probing/routing logic — it only wraps ddx-agent's public packages. Names the 8 beads in this epic, cross-references the cost-tiered routing epic as a future follow-up, and describes the upstream bead workflow: when a porcelain function is missing from ddx-agent's public Go API, file a bead on the agent repository.
bead.acceptance: (1) File exists at docs/helix/02-design/solution-designs/SD-023-agent-routing-visibility.md. (2) Doc names each of the 8 child beads by title. (3) Doc explicitly states the boundary: ddx-agent owns providers/models/routing; DDx owns workflow/UI. (4) Doc references github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/agent as the Go library being consumed. (5) Manual: reviewer reads the doc and can state the boundary in their own words.
